core_principles: Empathy First: The design must feel safe, warm, and non-judgmental. No clinical or hospital-like sterile aesthetics.
High Contrast & Legibility: Bengali typography must be large, breathable, and highly legible.
Generous Spacing: Use 2-3x more padding than standard websites to create a feeling of 'breathing room' and reduced cognitive load.
Organic Accents: Soft corners, warm hues, and gentle transitions. No aggressive borders or stark lines.

headings.strategy: Premium, authoritative yet compassionate. Use Noto Serif for all H1, H2, and H3 elements to establish a trustworthy, high-end medical feel.

body.strategy: Clean, modern, and highly readable on mobile devices. Essential for long-form blog reading.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2C4B3B] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3529] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium text-lg shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#2C4B3B] border border-[#2C4B3B]/20 hover:bg-[#F3F4F1] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium text-lg
buttons.ghost: text-[#2C4B3B] hover:text-[#1E3529] hover:bg-[#2C4B3B]/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-10 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100
cards.dark: bg-[#1A2E24] text-white rounded-3xl p-8 sm:p-10 shadow-xl

inputs.default: w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-slate-800 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2C4B3B]/20 focus:border-[#2C4B3B] transition-all

hero_background.instructions: Use with a heavy warm overlay (bg-[#FDFBF7]/90) so it feels like a subtle texture rather than a distracting image. Text must be highly legible.

doctor_portrait.instructions: Crop thoughtfully, rounded-3xl, place in the Authority/Empathy section with a soft shadow.

hero.headline: আপনার ভেতরের নীরব লড়াইটা আমরা বুঝি।
hero.subheadline: মানসিক প্রশান্তি কোনো বিলাসিতা নয়, এটি আপনার অধিকার। আসুন, একসাথে নতুন করে বাঁচার পথ খুঁজি।

authority.title: আপনার কথা শোনার জন্য আমি আছি
authority.body: দীর্ঘদিনের অভিজ্ঞতায় আমি দেখেছি, একটু সঠিক দিকনির্দেশনা এবং সহানুভূতি কীভাবে একটি জীবনকে বদলে দিতে পারে। আপনার অনুভূতিগুলো এখানে সম্পূর্ণ সুরক্ষিত।

structure: Hero Section (Large typography, emotional copy, clear CTA)

blog_list.layout: Grid of articles with large featured images, title, short excerpt, and read more link. Clean and minimal.

blog_single.layout: Narrow reading column (max-w-3xl) centered. Large headline, meta info (date), featured image, and rich text body. Generous line-height for readability.

admin_auth.layout: Centered clean card. Minimalist password-only input field. No email field required. 'Enter Admin Area' button.

admin_dashboard.layout: Simple top navigation bar. Clean data table for Blog CRUD operations. Focus on functionality. Use Shadcn Table, Button, Input, Dialog.

technical_instructions_for_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='book-appointment-btn').
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.whatsapp_integration: The CTA 'Book Appointment' must redirect to a WhatsApp link (e.g., href='https://wa.me/1234567890?text=I%20would%20like%20to%20book%20an%20appointment').
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.animations: Use framer-motion for gentle fade-ups on scroll. No aggressive or bouncy animations. Keep it highly subtle.
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.components: Do NOT use HTML native datepickers or selects. Use Shadcn components. Do not rely heavily on standard Shadcn Card everywhere; use raw divs with custom generous padding for marketing sections.
technical_instructions_for_main_agent.api_integration: Ensure FastAPI backend handles blog CRUD and admin authentication securely.
